allow: Bash(node -e "const g = require\(''./src/india-full.json''\); console.log\(''Features:'', g.features.length\); console.log\(''Names:'', g.features.map\(f => f.properties.name || f.properties.NAME_1 || f.properties.ST_NM || JSON.stringify\(Object.keys\(f.properties\)\)\).join\('', ''\)\)")

Bash(node -e "let d=''''''''; process.stdin.on\(''''data'''',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\(''''end'''',\(\)=>{ try{ const g=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\(''''Features:'''', g.features?.length\); const names=g.features?.map\(f=>Object.values\(f.properties||{}\)[0]\); console.log\(''''First names:'''', names?.slice\(0,5\)\); console.log\(''''Keys:'''', Object.keys\(g.features?.[0]?.properties||{}\)\); }catch\(e\){console.log\(''''fail'''',e.message,d.slice\(0,200\)\);}}\)")
